column8: Angular COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some grey, silty SAND and red brick and concrete fragments. (FILL)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained, kaolin and chlorite coated joints, dipping 10-20 degrees and vertical joints.
